case_summary: Pool sand filter pressure gauge reading much higher than usual; return flow into pool weak.

ground_truth.notes: Tests routing to pool_pump_filter for a filter (not pump) issue. The high-pressure-gauge + low-return-flow combination is a textbook blocked-filter pattern.

inputs.user_text: The pressure gauge on top of our pool sand filter is reading much higher than usual — it's normally on green but has been sitting in the red for over a week. The water coming out of the return jets back into the pool is much weaker than it used to be. Backwashing helps a little but the pressure climbs back up again within a day or two.
